title: Extract SKLottiePlayer and add Blazor Lottie support
body:
## Summary

Extract a shared `SKLottiePlayer` from the MAUI `SKLottieView` and add full Blazor WebAssembly Lottie support — including a new `SKLottieView` Blazor component, `SKAnimatedCanvasView` base component, documentation, and comprehensive tests.

## Staging

📖 [**View Staging Documentation**](https://mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/staging/365/)
🎮 [**View Staging Blazor Sample**](https://mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/staging/365/sample/)

## Changes

### Core Library (`SkiaSharp.Extended`)
- **`SKLottiePlayer`** — New platform-agnostic Lottie playback engine with Update/Render frame loop, speed control (including negative/reverse), and repeat management
- **`SKLottieRepeat`** — Readonly struct with `Never`, `Restart(count)`, and `Reverse(count)` factory methods, replacing the old separate RepeatMode/RepeatCount pattern
- Added `SkiaSharp.Skottie` dependency for Lottie rendering
- Full XML documentation on all public APIs

### Blazor Library (`SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor`) — New
- **`SKAnimatedCanvasView`** — Base Blazor component wrapping `SKCanvasView` with a ~60fps `PeriodicTimer` animation loop, `OnUpdate`/`OnPaintSurface` callbacks, and `Invalidate()` support
- **`SKLottieView`** — Blazor Lottie component with `Source` (URL), `RepeatMode`, `RepeatCount`, `AnimationSpeed`, `IsAnimationEnabled` parameters and lifecycle events (`AnimationLoaded`, `AnimationCompleted`, `AnimationFailed`, `AnimationUpdated`)
- **`SKLottieRepeatMode`** — Blazor-specific enum (`Restart`/`Reverse`)

### MAUI Library (`SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui`)
- Refactored `SKLottieView` to delegate all playback logic to the shared `SKLottiePlayer`
- Moved `SKLottieAnimation`, `SKLottieAnimationFailedEventArgs` types to core with assembly-level type forwarders in MAUI for backward compatibility
- Reduced `SKLottieView` from ~540 to ~270 lines

### Blazor Sample App
- New Lottie demo page with speed slider (−3× to +3×), repeat mode/count controls, restart button, and live progress display
- CSS isolation via `.razor.css` files
- "Controls" group in sidebar nav and homepage
- Bundled `trophy.json` animation

### Documentation
- **`lottie-player.md`** — SKLottiePlayer API reference (frame loop, speed, repeat modes, seeking, events)
- **`lottie-blazor.md`** — Blazor SKLottieView quick start, controls, events, sizing, plus SKAnimatedCanvasView guide
- **`lottie-maui.md`** — Updated MAUI docs with speed/direction section and cross-links
- Updated `toc.yml` with new Blazor and Lottie Player sections

### Tests
- **160 tests** across 3 test projects:
  - `SKLottiePlayerTest` (31 tests) — Seek clamping, repeat modes, negative speed, boundary detection, mode switching mid-animation, completion events
  - `SKAnimatedCanvasViewTest` (bUnit) — Timer lifecycle, paint callback, enable/disable toggle
  - `SKLottieViewTest` (MAUI, 4 tests) — View-specific file loading tests (playback tests moved to core)

## Key Design Decisions

1. **Player owns playback state, views own platform integration.** `SKLottiePlayer` is the single source of truth for progress, direction, and repeat logic. MAUI and Blazor views are thin wrappers that feed frame deltas and render calls.

2. **Repeat mode changes preserve direction mid-animation.** Switching repeat modes (e.g., Reverse → Restart) does not reset the playback direction immediately — direction only resets when the animation actually hits a boundary. This prevents jarring mid-animation direction flips.

3. **Blazor canvas invalidation is explicit.** `SKAnimatedCanvasView` calls `Invalidate()` on the inner `SKCanvasView` each frame in addition to `StateHasChanged()`, because Blazor re-rendering alone does not trigger SkiaSharp canvas repainting.

4. **WASM uses string-based animation loading.** `Animation.Parse(json)` via `HttpClient.GetStringAsync()` instead of `Animation.Create(stream)`, because native Skottie cannot read lazy async WASM streams synchronously.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot due to a somewhat unfortunate naming, the maui project has a assembly name of `SkiaSharp.Extended.UI`. And we also can't move the enum the way it is as the namespace is a breaking change. 
> 
> P...

Done in 3d1b22a.

- `SKLottieRepeatMode` enum is back in MAUI (`SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Controls`, `SkiaSharp.Extended.UI` assembly) — no namespace/assembly breaking change.
- New `SKLottieRepeat` readonly struct in core (`SkiaSharp.Extended`) replaces the enum for `SKLottiePlayer`. It has a private constructor, static factories (`Never`, `Restart(count = -1)`, `Reverse(count = -1)`), and bool properties (`IsRepeating`, `IsRestartRepeating`, `IsReverseRepeating`) plus `Count`.
- `SKLottiePlayer.Repeat` (single `SKLottieRepeat` property) replaces the old separate `RepeatMode` + `RepeatCount` properties.
- `SKLottieView.Update()` bridges the MAUI `RepeatMode`+`RepeatCount` bindable properties into a `SKLottieRepeat` for the player.
- MAUI sample XAML uses `controls:SKLottieRepeatMode` again (no `extended:` xmlns needed).
- Blazor sample uses `SKLottieRepeat.Restart()`/`SKLottieRepeat.Reverse()` directly.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please make sure you are doing good things here. The lottie player needs tests. the player should not be designed around the view, instead the API should be clean, neat and be self-contained....

Done in 6c74782. Added `SKLottiePlayerTest` with 20 tests (in `tests/SkiaSharp.Extended.Tests/Lottie/`) covering initial state, `SetAnimation`, `Seek`, `Update`, all three repeat modes, negative speed, and event firing. The player API is self-contained: `Progress`/`Duration`/`IsComplete`/`HasAnimation` are all getter-only; `Seek()` and `Update()` are the mutation methods; `Reset()` sets state directly without a guard flag. Also fixed `AnimationCompleted` to only fire on the `false → true` transition.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body:
@copilot please merge the latest changes in from main

then also go and see what test exist for lottie in the Maui tests and ee what we can move into the core tests. The goal is to have most tests in the core tests and then only maui/view specific tests in the Maui tests. 

Add a new Blazor tests project as well using xunit and bunit. 

Investigate the value of a Blazor version of SKAnimatedSurfaceView so we can share animation logic for multiple types of components. See what Blazor tests we need for this as well. 

Make sure to add xml comment docs to the new types we are adding. Also make sure the csproj has the doc file generation enabled. 

Also add new conceptual docs for the new things.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please merge the latest changes in from main
> 
> then also go and see what test exist for lottie in the Maui tests and ee what we can move into the core tests. The goal is to have most tests in ...

Done in 0a555b7. Here's what was addressed:

**Merge from main** — branch was already ahead of main with nothing to merge.

**Test migration** — Added 9 new tests to `SKLottiePlayerTest` (negative delta clamping, speed scaling ×2 / ×0.5 / ×0, dynamic speed changes, negative speed mid-playback, `Reverse(count:0)` one-cycle completion, negative speed + infinite Restart). `SKLottieViewTest` slimmed to 4 view/file-loading-only tests; all playback logic tests now live in core.

**Blazor test project** — New `tests/SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor.Tests/` with xunit v3 + bunit; 2 tests pass.

**Blazor `SKAnimatedCanvasView`** — New component in `source/SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor/Controls/` that mirrors MAUI `SKAnimatedSurfaceView`: `PeriodicTimer` at ~60 fps, `IsAnimationEnabled` parameter, `OnPaintSurface` callback, virtual `UpdateAsync(TimeSpan deltaTime)` for subclassing. Implements `IAsyncDisposable` for clean shutdown.

**XML docs** — `GenerateDocumentationFile=true` added to core, MAUI, and Blazor csproj. All public members of `SKLottiePlayer` and `SKLottieRepeat` have full XML docs (`<summary>`, `<param>`, `<remarks>`).

**Conceptual docs** — `lottie.md` updated with a "Cross-Platform Usage with SKLottiePlayer" section and `SKLottieRepeat` factory table. `toc.yml` updated to list "Lottie Player" under the `SkiaSharp.Extended` section.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: @copilot please merge the latest in from main and then see why the lottie does not load in the Blazor app.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please merge the latest in from main and then see why the lottie does not load in the Blazor app. 

Fixed in 7a9986d.

**Merge from main**: Applied the 3 files changed in main (`docs-deploy.yml`, `docs/404.html`, `docs/docfx.json` — the 404 direct-navigation fix).

**Root cause of Lottie not loading**: `Animation.Create(stream)` was being called with an `HttpClient` response stream, which in WASM is a lazy async stream. Native Skottie code can't perform synchronous reads on such a stream, so it silently returns `null`, causing the "Failed to load animation" state.

**Fix**: Changed `LoadAnimationAsync()` to use `Http.GetStringAsync(...)` + `Animation.Parse(json)`. This reads the entire JSON into memory before handing it to the native parser — fully WASM-compatible.

Also added the missing `bi-play-circle-nav-menu` CSS icon class for the Lottie entry in the nav sidebar.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: pleas do a 3 agent review of the code and see what issue we can fix.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body:
## 3-Agent Code Review — Results

Dispatched reviews to **Claude Opus 4.6**, **Gemini 3 Pro**, and **GPT-5.3 Codex**.

### Consensus Findings (flagged by 2+ agents)

| # | Severity | File | Issue | Agents |
|---|----------|------|-------|--------|
| 1 | 🟡 MODERATE | `SKLottieView.razor.cs:119-161` | `LoadAnimationAsync` missing `CancellationTokenSource` — race condition on rapid `Source` changes (stale out-of-order results) + native resource leak if disposed mid-load | 3/3 |
| 2 | 🟡 MODERATE | `SKLottieView.razor.cs:185-190` | `DisposeAsync` disposes native animation but doesn't call `_player.SetAnimation(null)` — use-after-free if animation loop callback fires during teardown | 2/3 |

### Non-Consensus (1 agent only, not actioned)
- Missing public `Seek()` method (Gemini only)
- `HttpClient` hard dependency for Blazor Server compat (Gemini only)

### Fixes Applied

Both consensus issues fixed in commit [`5dcf3bb4`](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp.Extended/commit/5dcf3bb4):

1. **Added `CancellationTokenSource`** to `LoadAnimationAsync` — cancels in-flight loads when `Source` changes or component disposes, with post-cancellation guard checks
2. **`DisposeAsync` now calls `_player.SetAnimation(null)`** before disposing the native handle, preventing use-after-free during teardown

All 160 tests pass ✅

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: Please do a thorough 3 agent review to find any issues. Make sure the API is consistent and follows .NET guidelines. Make sure the docs are up to date.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body:
## Thorough 3-Agent Review — Results

Dispatched to **Claude Opus 4.6** (API/.NET guidelines), **Gemini 3 Pro** (bugs/logic), **GPT-5.3 Codex** (docs accuracy).

### Findings

| # | Severity | Area | File | Issue | Agent |
|---|----------|------|------|-------|-------|
| 1 | 🟡 | API consistency | `SKLottieView.razor.cs:46` | Blazor `RepeatCount` defaulted to `-1` (infinite loop) vs MAUI `0` (play once) — inconsistent cross-platform behavior | Opus |
| 2 | 🟡 | Event ordering | `SKLottieView.shared.cs:156` | MAUI `AnimationCompleted` event fired before `IsComplete`/`Progress` BindableProperties were synced — subscribers saw stale state | Opus |
| 3 | 🟡 | Resource safety | `SKLottieView.razor.cs:147` | Dispose-before-clear: `_loadedAnimation` disposed while `_player` still referenced it, potential use-after-free if paint fires during `Animation.Parse` | Gemini |
| 4 | 🟡 | Docs | `docs/index.md:61` | Link to `docs/lottie.md` broken — file was renamed to `lottie-maui.md` | GPT-5.3 |

### All Fixes Applied — commit [`f4249fc14`](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp.Extended/commit/f4249fc14)

1. **RepeatCount default aligned** — Blazor now defaults to `0` (play once), matching MAUI
2. **AnimationCompleted ordering fixed** — `OnPlayerAnimationCompleted` now syncs `Duration`, `Progress`, `IsComplete` before firing the event
3. **Disposal ordering fixed** — `_player.SetAnimation(null)` called before disposing native handle during reload
4. **Broken doc link fixed** — `lottie.md` → `lottie-maui.md` in docs/index.md

### Not Actioned (lower priority)
- Overshoot time loss on loop restart (Gemini only) — animation plays correctly, just loses sub-frame time at boundaries. Low visual impact.

All 160 tests pass ✅
